tasks.label: JC4880: Flash P4
tasks.command: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}\build'; & 'C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\python_env\idf5.5_py3.12_env\Scripts\python.exe' -m esptool --chip esp32p4 -p '${config:jc4880.ports.p4}' -b ${config:jc4880.flashBaud.p4} --before default_reset --after hard_reset write_flash --flash_mode dio --flash_size keep --flash_freq 80m 0x2000 bootloader\bootloader.bin 0x20000 ESP32P4_Remote.bin 0x8000 partition_table\partition-table.bin 0xf000 ota_data_initial.bin 0xfc0000 storage.bin

tasks.label: JC4880: Flash C6
tasks.command: Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}\coprocessor_c6\build'; & 'C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\python_env\idf5.5_py3.12_env\Scripts\python.exe' -m esptool --chip esp32c6 -p '${config:jc4880.ports.c6}' -b ${config:jc4880.flashBaud.c6} --before default_reset --after hard_reset write_flash --flash_mode dio --flash_freq 80m --flash_size 4MB 0x0 bootloader\bootloader.bin 0x8000 partition_table\partition-table.bin 0xd000 ota_data_initial.bin 0x10000 network_adapter.bin

tasks.label: ESP Hosted C6: Flash and Monitor
tasks.command: set "PATH=C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\python_env\idf5.5_py3.12_env\Scripts;%PATH%" && call "C:\Espressif\frameworks\esp-idf-v5.5.4\export.bat" && set "PATH=C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\tools\riscv32-esp-elf\esp-14.2.0_20260121\riscv32-esp-elf\bin;C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\tools\cmake\3.30.2\bin;C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\tools\ninja\1.12.1;C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\tools\idf-exe\1.0.3;C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\tools\ccache\4.12.1\ccache-4.12.1-windows-x86_64;%PATH%" && set "CMAKE_C_COMPILER=C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\tools\riscv32-esp-elf\esp-14.2.0_20260121\riscv32-esp-elf\bin\riscv32-esp-elf-gcc.exe" && set "CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\tools\riscv32-esp-elf\esp-14.2.0_20260121\riscv32-esp-elf\bin\riscv32-esp-elf-g++.exe" && set "CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER=C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\tools\riscv32-esp-elf\esp-14.2.0_20260121\riscv32-esp-elf\bin\riscv32-esp-elf-gcc.exe" && "C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\python_env\idf5.5_py3.12_env\Scripts\python.exe" C:\Espressif\frameworks\esp-idf-v5.5.4\tools\idf.py build -p ${input:espBrookesiaPort} flash monitor

tasks.label: JC4880: Flash Selected Target
tasks.command: $target = '${config:jc4880.flashTarget}'; if ($target -eq 'c6') { Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}\coprocessor_c6\build'; & 'C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\python_env\idf5.5_py3.12_env\Scripts\python.exe' -m esptool --chip esp32c6 -p '${config:jc4880.ports.c6}' -b ${config:jc4880.flashBaud.c6} --before default_reset --after hard_reset write_flash --flash_mode dio --flash_freq 80m --flash_size 4MB 0x0 bootloader\bootloader.bin 0x8000 partition_table\partition-table.bin 0xd000 ota_data_initial.bin 0x10000 network_adapter.bin } elseif ($target -eq 'p4') { Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}\build'; & 'C:\Users\Elik\.espressif\python_env\idf5.5_py3.12_env\Scripts\python.exe' -m esptool --chip esp32p4 -p '${config:jc4880.ports.p4}' -b ${config:jc4880.flashBaud.p4} --before default_reset --after hard_reset write_flash --flash_mode dio --flash_size keep --flash_freq 80m 0x2000 bootloader\bootloader.bin 0x20000 ESP32P4_Remote.bin 0x8000 partition_table\partition-table.bin 0xf000 ota_data_initial.bin 0xfc0000 storage.bin } else { Write-Error ('Unsupported jc4880.flashTarget ' + $target + '. Use p4 or c6.'); exit 1 }
